_description: Vulnerability allowlist for npm audit. Each entry documents a known vulnerability that has been reviewed and accepted with justification.

allowlist.justification: Transitive dependency of @prisma/dev (Prisma CLI tooling). Not used in application code — hono's serveStatic middleware is not invoked. Fix requires breaking Prisma major version downgrade.
Transitive dependency of @prisma/dev. Hono is not used directly — only pulled in by Prisma's internal dev tooling. serveStatic middleware bypass is not reachable.
Transitive dependency of @prisma/dev. Cookie handling vulnerability not reachable — hono is not used as the application's HTTP framework.
Transitive dependency of @prisma/dev. Cookie name bypass not reachable — hono is not used as the application's HTTP framework.
Transitive dependency of @prisma/dev. IP restriction bypass not reachable — hono is not used for IP filtering.
Transitive dependency of @prisma/dev. Path traversal in toSSG() not reachable — SSG functionality is not used.
Transitive dependency of @tensorflow/tfjs-node via @mapbox/node-pre-gyp. Only used during native binary installation, not at runtime. tar is not used to extract user-supplied archives.
Transitive dependency of @tensorflow/tfjs-node via @mapbox/node-pre-gyp. Only used during native binary installation, not at runtime.
Transitive dependency of @tensorflow/tfjs-node via @mapbox/node-pre-gyp. Only used during native binary installation, not at runtime.
Transitive dependency of @tensorflow/tfjs-node via @mapbox/node-pre-gyp. Only used during native binary installation, not at runtime.
Transitive dependency of @tensorflow/tfjs-node via @mapbox/node-pre-gyp. Only used during native binary installation, not at runtime.
Transitive dependency of @tensorflow/tfjs-node via @mapbox/node-pre-gyp. Only used during native binary installation, not at runtime.

_entrySchema.justification: Why this vulnerability is accepted (e.g., dev-only dependency, not reachable in production)
_entrySchema.reviewDate: ISO date when the vulnerability was last reviewed (YYYY-MM-DD)
_entrySchema.nextReviewDate: ISO date when the vulnerability should be re-evaluated (YYYY-MM-DD)
